Bash(uv run python -c "
from src.memory.database_config import DatabaseConfig
dc = DatabaseConfig\(\)
with dc.create_session\(\) as db:
    try:
        db.execute\(__import__\(''sqlalchemy''\).text\(''ALTER TABLE character_states DROP COLUMN is_persona''\)\)
        db.commit\(\)
        print\(''Dropped is_persona column''\)
    except Exception as e:
        print\(f''Column may not exist or SQLite limitation: {e}''\)
")
